description: User is examining property listings on the Booking.com search results page, focusing on the 'Deluxe Two-Bedroom' apartment.

description: The screen transitions from the browser to a dark system overlay, likely for task management or recording.

description: User dwells on the 'Repeat the task instructions' button within the system overlay.

description: User continues to dwell on the 'Repeat the task instructions' button, suggesting they are reading or considering the instructions.
